docs.title: Welcome
docs.text:
Welcome to WillyStation! Where you can watch some shit for free.

Let's Get Started...

docs.title: Creating A Plex Account
docs.text:
Create your Plex Account • Go to Plex.tv. • Click "Sign Up For Free"

Share the email that you used to sign up with on Plex.tv with Willy via:

• Text (IYKYK) • Email - willy@willystation.com Once your Plex email is received, an invite to the server will be sent to you via e-mail. Please check your email for the library invite from Plex.tv and follow the link to accept. Next Section: Initial Setup

docs.title: Initial Setup
docs.text:
Once you have created a new account and accepted the libray invitation, it is now time to set up your account. On your favorite stream device, find and install the Plex app.

Note for people wanting to stream from Mac: Do not use the browser-based Plex app. Please download the Plex Desktop App for MAC OS.

Once installed, sign in with your Plex account.

Optional: Remove all of Plex's built-in libraries (i.e Discover, Live TV, Movies & Shows) Keep only the ones that you were invited to by me, which are as follows: Anime Anime (Film) Movies Movies (4K) † TV TV (4K) † Music (Videos) Music The Adult Section † † By Request Only

Important Final Step:

After [optionally] setting up your libraries, head to:

Settings > Quality Disable any setting like "Use Recommended Settings" Change Remote and Local/Home Streaming Quality settings to "Maximum" or "Original" (platform dependent)

note: this setting will need to be changed once upon login for any new device.

After signing in to the Plex App, you can start streaming Movies and TV Shows! Next Section: Request Movies & TV

docs.title: Requesting Movies & TV Shows
docs.text:
Please visit the WillyStation Request Site aka Overseerr to request movies and shows! • Sign in using your own Plex account.

• Search Movie/Show and simply click "Request" button. Movies will be available to stream within 5-30 minutes. If a movie has not been added to Plex within an hour after request, please email or text.

Note for TV Series:

Movies are auto-requested by default.

TV series are not.

For long-form tv series, please only request one or two seasons at a time and I will review and approve request.

If a TV request has not been approved within 24 hours, please email or text.
